title: Malfunction involving temporary registers and sub-queries implemented by vdbe sub-routines.
key_bug_features: Temporary registers and sub-queries in vdbe sub-routines
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 10 WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = 'Test1');
